patterns.title: Vulnerability Title
patterns.rootCause:
The fundamental issues arise from:

1. **Missing intrinsic gas charges**: EIP-2930 access list costs not being charged upfront

2. **Infinite gas meters**: Privileged message types using unbounded gas

2. **Poll state not invalidated after action** - Stale polls can re-trigger flags
